CheckTitle: Ensure no security groups allow ingress from the internet to Cassandra ports TCP 7199, 9160 and 8888.
Description: Ensure no security groups allow ingress from the internet to Cassandra ports TCP 7199, 9160 and 8888.
Risk: Exposing Cassandra ports to the internet can allow unauthorized access to database services and may lead to data disclosure, data loss or service compromise.

Recommendation.Text: Modify the security group to remove ingress rules that allow traffic from the internet to TCP ports 7199, 9160 or 8888.
